The final answer is 2.4 hours. When both pipes A and B are opened together, they can fill (frac{5}{12}) of the tank per hour. To find the time (t) it takes to fill the entire tank, we solve the equation (frac{5}{12} cdot t = 1), which gives (t = frac{12}{5} = 2.4) hours
